topic: percent increase, perimeter and area of squares
latex:
The sides of a square garden are 8 feet long.

\textbf{a.} You increase the side length of the garden by 25\%. Find the new side length.

\textbf{b.} Find the percent of change in the perimeter of the garden.

\textbf{c.} Find the percent of change in the area of the garden.
